=Index of exceptions=

|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\A|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Account_already_activated_unconnected"| exception Handlers.Account_already_activated_unconnected >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Handlers >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Exception raised when an account has been already activated and no user is
    connected~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\C|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Custom_action_link"| exception Handlers.Custom_action_link >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Handlers >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Exception raised when something went wrong with an action link key~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\I|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Invalid_action_key"| exception Handlers.Invalid_action_key >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Handlers >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Exception raised when the key is oudated~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\N|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="No_such_resource"| exception Handlers.No_such_resource >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Handlers >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Exception raised when the requested resource is not available~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Not_connected"| exception Session.Not_connected >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Session >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\P|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Permission_denied"| exception Session.Permission_denied >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Session >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Predicate_failed"| exception Page.Predicate_failed >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Page >>~]||
\\
